title: API and storage-path translation for migrating to Fabric
summary: Translation table for porting Synapse, Databricks, and HDInsight code to Fabric: utility APIs (mssparkutils/dbutils -> notebookutils), storage paths (DBFS/WASB/ADLS -> OneLake), catalogs, and orchestration.

utility_apis.mssparkutils.fs.*: notebookutils.fs.* (Synapse -> Fabric; same method surface: ls, cp, mv, rm, mkdirs, head, put).
utility_apis.dbutils.secrets.get: notebookutils.credentials.getSecret (Databricks secret scopes -> Fabric connections/Key Vault).
utility_apis.%run ./other_nb: notebookutils.notebook.run('other_nb') or refactor shared code into a library.

storage_paths.dbfs:/ or /dbfs/: OneLake: abfss://<workspace>@onelake.dfs.fabric.microsoft.com/<lakehouse>.Lakehouse/Files/... (or the lakehouse-relative Files/ path in a bound notebook).
storage_paths.wasb[s]://container@account.blob.core.wi: OneLake abfss path, or a Lakehouse shortcut to keep data in place (fabio shortcut create).
storage_paths.abfss://...dfs.core.windows.net (ADLS Ge: OneLake abfss path, or a shortcut (fabio shortcut create --target adlsgen2).
storage_paths.s3://: OneLake, or a Lakehouse shortcut (fabio shortcut create --target s3).

catalog_and_tables.Unity Catalog (catalog.schema.table): Lakehouse Tables/ (Delta). Read via spark.read of the lakehouse table path or the SQL analytics endpoint.
catalog_and_tables.Hive metastore / HiveContext: Remove HiveContext; use spark.sql on the SparkSession. Hive tables -> lakehouse Delta tables.
catalog_and_tables.Synapse serverless SQL: Fabric SQL analytics endpoint over a Lakehouse (fabio sql-endpoint ...).

orchestration.ADF global parameters: Fabric Variable Library with dev/test/prod value sets (fabio variable-library ...).
orchestration.ADF/Synapse triggers: Fabric job schedules (fabio data-pipeline create-schedule / job-scheduler create-schedule).
orchestration.Databricks Jobs: Fabric Data Pipelines or job schedules.

compute_notes: Spark pool / cluster sizing does NOT migrate — Fabric manages Spark compute per capacity.
spark.conf platform-specific settings should be removed; Fabric sets sane defaults.
IntegrationRuntime has no equivalent — on-prem connectivity uses gateways/connections.
validation: Compare row counts: source vs 'fabio warehouse query ... SELECT COUNT(*)' or 'fabio lakehouse list-tables'.
Spot-check schema and a sample of aggregates before decommissioning the source.
